mainHtml:
Home/Solutions/2D Bubble Drawing Annotation

Turn 2D Drawings into Inspectable, Communicable Annotation Documents

Generate balloon numbers and inspection items on 2D drawings to support quality inspection, quotation, first article inspection and manufacturing communication.

Upload Drawing

Organize Drawing Inspection Items into an Actionable Checklist

Balloon annotation does more than add numbers to drawings. It breaks dimensions, hole positions, surface requirements and inspection standards into quality information for quotation, first article inspection and tracking.

The system builds numbering logic around key features and maps each number to an inspection item, helping quality, engineering and suppliers communicate around the same drawing.

Balloon NumbersInspection ItemsFirst Article DocumentsQuality Collaboration

Recommended Preparation

  • 2D engineering drawing file
  • Critical dimensions and tolerances
  • Inspection standard or template
  • BOM or part list

From Drawing to Inspection Documents

Output is not only a numbered drawing, but also the fields needed for later inspection and quotation breakdown.

Balloon DrawingGenerate clear numbers for critical dimensions, hole positions and features.
Inspection ChecklistOrganize annotation items into a list usable for quality inspection and first article confirmation.
Quotation CollaborationHelp engineering and procurement clarify inspection workload and quality-document scope.

Collaboration After Annotation

Suitable for first article inspection, batch reinspection, outsourced machining handoff and customer quality-document archiving.

01Drawing RecognitionDistinguish dimensions, tolerances, hole positions, chamfers, roughness and technical requirements to avoid mixing non-critical notes into the inspection list.
02Inspection ChecklistMap balloon numbers to inspection item, unit, nominal value, tolerance range and remarks for quality entry.
03Document DeliveryCan continue into inspection-cost quotation, first article report preparation and supplier manufacturing handoff.

Organize 2D Drawings into Inspectable Documents

After uploading drawings, generate balloon annotations and inspection items before quotation or quality confirmation.

Generate Annotation
